race.comment: FALL FOR AUTUMN (4) was ridden on the speed and wouldn't lie down but eventually found the winner a shade too good when resuming over 1000m here last start. Nicely placed out to this trip at the second run back. Maps beautifully just behind the lead and is going to be tough to hold out. PATRIOTICINTENTION (6) has been prominent at all three runs this prep, the latest effort a game second after leading for home over 1400m at this track. May get his own way in front and back to this trip will be a tough bunny to chase. COCO DREAMING (1) produced an eye-catcher recently when second-up from a spell, powering home to be beaten under a length over 1206m at Port Macquarie. Hasn't won for a while but this looks an ideal setup. Last start Taree maiden winner PARFUMIER (8) will be handy in the run and looks capable of making this step up in grade. WOKOU (11) doesn't win out of turn but recent efforts give her a chance at the top four.
